paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline discussing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns and a $375M convertibles deal. The news item is from simplywall.st and dated July 17, 2026.

There are 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form dated July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form dated July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson.
